claims: The Ruler Maximal skill mandates pulling and installing new skills from an external repository (via `npx ai-agent-skills install`) on every interaction, which is excessive for its stated purpose of orchestrating and maximizing skill usage. This action could lead to security risks, unnecessary resource consumption, and installation of unverified code without user consent. Additionally, it uses system-level commands like `say` for narration, which may require unnecessary access to system audio or text-to-speech capabilities, further extending beyond core orchestration needs.
